qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Three processes arrive at time zero with bursts of and milliseconds. If the scheduler has prior knowledge about the length of the bursts, the minimum achievable average waiting time for these three processes in a non-preemptive scheduler (rounded to nearest integer) is _____________ milliseconds.

qids.subject: Operating System
qids.prose: Which of the following statement(s) is/are correct in the context of scheduling? A. Turnaround time includes waiting time B. The goal is to only maximize utilization and minimize throughput C. Round-robin policy can be used even when the time required by each of the processes is not known apriori D.
